purpose: Tighten the current-hash strict body-contact runtime request with explicit acceptance criteria, expected off-controls, and exact Lane 2 blocker boundaries.

required_runtime_checks.name: current_hash_graph_load
required_runtime_checks.pass_condition: Workflow hash 5C67A23D1F70A6E7A5687E99E58F73EA475A172B4736F32D192AB3929BC35EC9 loads with no missing LoadImage, LoadImageMask, model, or active endpoint errors on the strict body-contact path.
required_runtime_checks.capture: Record exact node-level success or exact failing node and error text.

required_runtime_checks.name: per_hand_placeholder_resolution
required_runtime_checks.pass_condition: Nodes 1051-1054 resolve to exact-name files and are treated as intentional zero/off controls, not missing-reference failures.
required_runtime_checks.capture: Record whether each node resolved, plus any UI/runtime warning emitted for zero/off masks.

required_runtime_checks.name: actor_body_zero_mask_semantics
required_runtime_checks.pass_condition: Node 1009 character_b_body_mask.png is accepted as zero/off if the actor_hand_only_contact_v1 path still runs without graph failure.
required_runtime_checks.capture: If rejected, record exact node, validation error, and whether a fallback bypass is possible without editing Main Flow.

required_runtime_checks.name: strict_body_contact_preview_capture
required_runtime_checks.pass_condition: If runtime execution is justified, capture generated output plus any available previews for nodes 1032, 1059-1062, and 1067-1070.
required_runtime_checks.capture: Store file paths, hashes, and a note for which previews were unavailable.

required_runtime_checks.name: auxiliary_runtime_visibility
required_runtime_checks.pass_condition: Record whether the YOLO hand detector, SAM, and DWPose auxiliary assets required for strict hand/body-contact readiness are visible and loadable in the runtime environment.
required_runtime_checks.capture: Explicitly report status for bbox/hand_yolov8n.pt, sam_vit_b_01ec64.pth, and dw-ll_ucoco_384_bs5.torchscript.pt.

proves: current-hash strict body-contact path resolves its required file references
zero/off per-hand placeholders behave as explicit off-controls instead of missing files
runtime can or cannot tolerate the zero/off actor-body mask on node 1009
preview/output evidence exists for later Lane 5 or Lane 6 visual QA
does_not_prove: same-scene nonzero Character A/B left/right hand segmentation
full actor-body collision or deformation validity if node 1009 stays zero/off

expected_blockers_to_preserve: Keep named left/right per-hand contact edges blocked unless trustworthy same-scene nonzero split masks exist.
Keep full actor-body collision/deformation QA blocked unless node 1009 gains a trustworthy same-scene actor-body mask.
Do not promote strict visual hand/contact acceptance from runtime success alone; that still needs Lane 5 visual QA.
stop_conditions: Stop immediately if AWS auth is still invalid or no approved Lane 4 lease window exists.
Stop after collecting enough evidence to classify the path as pass, precise runtime blocker, or auxiliary-asset blocker.
Release lease and capture EC2 stopped-state proof after completion.
